channel.title: Grafana on Dijure | Digital Architectures with a hint of Java
channel.description: Recent content in Grafana on Dijure | Digital Architectures with a hint of Java

item.title: Prometheus and Grafana
item.description:
This lab introduces you to observing the metrics of your cluster and applications. You’ll install and use the common stack of Prometheus and Grafana. Both of these applications have a large set of features and configuration options. This lab will keep you focused on just the key important features to get you started.

This lab is inspired by the VMWare Tanzu article “Gathering Metrics from Kubernetes with Prometheus and Grafana” . The article will help further explain the steps in this lab and the importance of metrics.
